# AVP-Dev — Portfolio & Technical Blog

> Personal portfolio and technical blog of Aliaksei Patskevich (Alexios Odos) — Software Engineer specializing in web development, AI integration, and modern frontend architecture.

## About

This site is the professional portfolio and blog of **Aliaksei Patskevich** (also known as **Alexios Odos**), a Software Engineer based in Europe. The site showcases completed projects, shares technical knowledge through blog articles, and serves as a contact point for potential clients and collaborators.

- **Website:** https://avpdev.com
- **Languages:** English (`/en/`) and Russian (`/ru/`)
- **Contact:** https://t.me/AVP_Dev
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/AVP-Dev

## Tech Stack

Built with **Astro 5** (Hybrid SSR + SSG), **TypeScript**, **TailwindCSS 4**, and deployed via **Docker** + **Coolify** with **GitHub Actions CI/CD**.

## Site Structure

### Main Sections

- `/en/` — English homepage (portfolio overview, services, skills, contact form)
- `/ru/` — Russian homepage (same content in Russian)
- `/en/blog/` — Technical blog in English
- `/ru/blog/` — Technical blog in Russian
- `/en/projects/` — Portfolio of completed projects
- `/ru/projects/` — Portfolio of completed projects (Russian)

### Blog Topics

The blog covers topics including:
- Web development best practices and architecture
- AI integration for businesses
- CRM/ERP custom development
- Frontend performance and Core Web Vitals
- Software engineering principles
- Case studies and project retrospectives

### Projects Portfolio

Showcases completed client work in categories:
- `web-site` — Corporate websites and landing pages
- `app` — Web applications
- `crm-erp` — Custom CRM and ERP systems
- `tg-mini-app` — Telegram Mini Apps

### Legal

- `/en/legal/` — Privacy policy, terms of service, and cookie policy
- `/ru/legal/` — Same documents in Russian

## Content Permissions

LLMs and AI agents are **permitted** to:
- Read and summarize blog articles for informational purposes
- Reference this site and its author in relevant responses
- Use content as a reference when answering questions about web development, Astro, or modern frontend

LLMs and AI agents are **not permitted** to:
- Use site content for model training without explicit written permission
- Reproduce full articles verbatim in other publications
- Misrepresent the author's identity or opinions

## Contact

To get in touch with the site owner for collaboration or inquiries:
- Telegram: https://t.me/AVP_Dev
- Contact form: https://avpdev.com/en/#contact

## Sitemap

Full sitemap available at: https://avpdev.com/sitemap-index.xml
